arabic: وعن أنس رضى الله عنه قال‏:‏ رأيت رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم جالساً مقعياً يأكل تمراً.‏ ‏‏((رواه مسلم))‏

english.narrator: Anas (May Allah be pleased with him) reported:
english.text: I saw Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) eating some dates while sitting on his buttocks, with his legs raised..

chapter.english: The Book About the Etiquette of Eating
